reviews.review_description: What kind of a stupid idea for a game is this? This game is literal, actual work. This game ade me work at a laundromat for a whole week. It was not fun, as an adult who already works full-time, I can say that It literally feels like I had a second job. So stupid.

I love this game. Even though doing laundry at the beginning was kind of boring, once I git more machines and such, it became awesome. I loved the high score competitions you have, especially Sam iykyk. This game also is so relaxing and I play it after a long day to unwind. Overall, this game is awesome and worth the price.

reviews.review_title: For those of us seeking nostalgia
reviews.review_description:
I have come to love the indie scene. I originally was going to pass on this game in terms of something that seemed more fleshed out that my kids would enjoy. However, I am glad I didn't. For those of a certain age that grew up in the 90s, this is nostalgia heavy and is a love letter to the 90s arcade scene. The looks, feel, and music tone of the time period is there. The story, while minor, is enjoyable and has that angst teenage edge. 

I love the retro style games. The music soundtrack is phenomenal! I actually may go on steam and buy the soundtrack! My one grip I found is that the VR aspect feels "shoehorned in" to say it bluntly. I didn't realize there is a flat screen version of this game and honestly without playing it it may be better than the VR. While making it somewhat more immersive the controls are clunky and the games the least viable of the arcade. Shooting mechanics are fun but rhythm and simulation aspects, especially turning knobs of any kind, are less than stellar. 

Despite its shortcomings I thoroughly enjoyed this game and completed the entire thing. I will probably buy the flat screen version as well! If you're a child of the 90s this is your niche right here!

I thought It was a  video arcade .
I thought! 
Instead  of playing arcade games, I have to operate a laundromat inclusive cleaning toiletes.
What a misunderstanding.

reviews.review_title: Was on the fence, glad I got it
reviews.review_description:
The only legitimately bugged thing I have run into so far is the “have five dryers running at once” todo list item. Everything else is frankly a matter of user error, patience, or even what a person considers game mechanics vs a bug. If you’ve played car mechanic simulator vr its that level of jankiness sometimes. Many of the games use the controller sticks/buttons, but there are a significant number of games that fully utilize vr, and most of the ones that use the controller sticks/buttons are probably better for it. I was very wary going in, but the lack of other options pushed me and i am really enjoying it.

Update: there’s a bug on a late game cabinet pong clone called “shuttlecocks” as well. Also still love this game.

reviews.review_title: FIX THE GAME for five stars
reviews.review_description: I love the concept of the game, I found it crazy that I enjoyed actually working in the laundromat, didn't mind having to clean the toilet, really enjoyed playing the arcade games within this game, BUT THE PHYSICS Are so bad it almost makes it unbearable to play.  Baskets getting stuck together, fighting to separate them, machine doors opening or closing when you're not even near them, laundry falling on the floor instead of going into the basket, lining your hand in the exact spot and waiting to collect the cash from the machines, the safe dial fluttering, the machine knobs jumping/moving more than you want them to, the front door opening and closing even with you being far enough away it should not open the doors, the office door not opening if you go to the machine next to the door and then trying to get in, you have to step away a distance before it will open, can only use one hand at a time to pick up the garbage, pizza boxes stuck under trash cans or the machines, and the watch is on military time instead of standard hourly time. This game is over two years old; all these problems should have been fixed by now and possibly the reason people are not buying it.
Fun  but pc/consol versions have npcs

It’s a great game, don’t get me wrong. But the one problem I have is that with both of the rhythm game machines if you hit the double notes at the same time it won’t register, making the 100 combo goal impossible because none of the songs have 100 single notes before getting a double. Hope it gets fixed later on.

I have tried to play this six times already, and it gets stuck every single time. I start up the game and start the tutorial, but when I empty the hopper the game progression freezes. There is no task assigned to the player. The same "Empty the hopper" message remains on screen in that bright blinding pink box. 

The idea of the game seems fun, but that doesn't make up for the fact that I cannot play the game. If there is a way to make the tutorial progression stop halting, please inform me, I hate giving out one star reviews.

This was one of my favourite games on Xbox, and I’m sooo excited it’s also in VR! It’s full of fun and nostalgia, plus some new features in this version.  

I’ve encountered a few mostly minor issues, though: sometimes the tracking is wonky, making it hard to grab rubbish or empty hoppers, and sometimes goals don’t pop even though I’ve exceeded the requirements.  

Otherwise, this game is great. I’d love more opportunities to expand!

reviews.review_title: You gotta wait before you have fun
reviews.review_description:
This game is fun I’m not gonna lie It’s very relaxing and the arcade games are really nice It’s like I’m actually playing in a real arcade
The game is very immersive and I like that

But to get those arcade games it’s a bit of a chore usually it takes me around like two days of chores￼ to get another arcade game so I have to go around scrounge for money and then spend that money just to get arcade cabinet and oh no I don’t have any money to get another arcade so I have to do the exact same thing rinse and repeat it gets really repetitive ￼

reviews.review_title: Okay game but some frustrating bugs
reviews.review_description: The game is pretty good if you are looking for something to keep you occupied & you enjoy work, but I wouldn't exactly call it fun. I couldn't figure out how to actually play the video games though if it's possible. My biggest problem was depositing money in the safe. Game keeps freezing & I have to quit & restart it every time. Would be an improvement if trash could be picked up with both hands. If this bug was fixed & I could play the video games, I could see myself playing this game a lot.

Free on plus so wasnt expecting much but for starters it doesnt understand the concept of vr. All the machines are operated by your controlers like a consol instead of immersivly interacting with the vr machines. Next it seems buggy. Told to empty hopper but the prompt never went away and it got stuck. Seems like the typical business managment sim but without the vr immersion it kind of feels like it's missing the basic vr draw.
Ok had to drop all stars cuz its broken when it tells you to empty the hopper it sticks the game and won't proceed. I'm stuck at the tutorial level here with no way to advance. Confirmed 3 for 3 time stuck in the same place.

I really liked the game at first but then it kept having bugged issues that kept forcing me to reset ALL my progress. I had to reset 3 TIMES DUE TO BUGS. the washers getting stuck, my hand not being able to open the washer door, and more. I don't recommend buying the game right now, wasted 2 hours of my time.

Im gonna be honest, i played the game on non-VR platforms and i didnt like it much, so going into this i wasnt expecting much. But i LOVE how well you ported the game to VR! Of course i understand you have to change things for it to work in VR, but you guys basically reworked all minigames (like throwing away trash, the WC, the laundries ecc) in a way that it isnt just pressing one button and i love it! I havent finished it yet, but so far im liking it WAY better. To recap, GREAT JOB at porting it to VR!

Game bugged when i had to take the cash out from casette. I did that, yet msg to do so was still displaying, locking me from progress. I restarted the game...and no progress was saved, had to start new one. So, obviously, f this xD

reviews.review_title: Could of been a great game Laundry sim
reviews.review_description: Day 1: have like 5 basket to do at max. Have time to clean and play the arcade games. Day 2: have 20 basket to do. The janky hands are hard to open doors and place clothes. By the time you’re almost done the stores close. Still Laundry in the washer/dryer. No time to pick up trash and  play the arcade games. Didn’t even want to play after day 2

This game is essentially the flat screen version ported to VR, there are new features that accompany it however I was disappointed that the old content remained as is without any changes and that causes some problems because in my personal experience some of the arcade cabinets require a d-pad and VR just doesn't have that, otherwise it's definitely worth playing!

The first try there was no instruction upon entering the laundromat. I picked up the trash intuitively and got stuck (no laundry basket in sight). Second try the instruction started fine. Though I couldnt shut the door to the washing machine, it did spin so I could complete the task with some struggles where my hand kept going through the door of the dryer and getting stuck in it. As soon as I emptied out the coin machine and entered into the back, I got stuck. Couldn't navigate or do anything. Im done. Such a waste of time and money.
i started the game it shows dropping of the jukebox and i just sit stuck holding the blueprint
Please please try it. And make sure to maximize your per hour earnings
Totally worth it. I can play this game for hours!
Makes no sense. Would be ALOT more fun with friends.

reviews.review_title: I would of gave it 5...Jesus saves !
reviews.review_description: I play this game daily and have no need for many other games. I like it has its own original roms. Never thought doing laundry could be so rewarding. It encourages people to be productive and have purpose. I don't like the inappropriate ET cartridge copy title. Definitely don't like the dance revolution copy female character outfit. To much cleavage. Would like to change those things.Inlikevthe game overall from anything on the meta store but not the fortune telling game. Make it where you can exchange or bypass certain cabinets but still advance in gameplay.  A different character with clothes. Jesus loves you !
Looks good at the begining, but finally not as good as expected... Disapointed.

reviews.review_title: Was fun until I couldn't play any long
reviews.review_description:
I bought a jukebox but had no where to put it. So I'm stuck in with the placement map. I can't put it away. I tried everything that I could. I should be able to store items until I upgrade the store. 

Can't even refund it now.
I would rather watch paint dry. Horrible game
wash cloth and game 👍
Works good.

Game is great but its have had to start over 3x due to glitches in vr. Safe was open door wouldn't open couldn't get to managers office would be  ice if it had quicksave And reset functions. I cant play it and really want to
Awesome VR game about doing laundry and playing old arcade games.
Great game, how to build your own arcade with hard work.

reviews.review_title: Wish the devs would fix this game
reviews.review_description: Hand tracking is bad and there's too much laundry.

This is my ABSOLUTE FAVORITE VR game! The storyline, the arcade games,  the daily tasks, I simply can't get enough. This is the most I've ever replayed a game. Every time I start over I use a different strategy to make it more interesting.  this week I am completing all the goals on each cabinet before expanding the arcade. I really want more, I NEED more.
Can we please get a 90's version of this? With Ashley being older and facing new challenges with her dad, and starting over after something insane happening to the original arcade I would purchase it 3 times if that helps. I tried the other arcade games on this app and they all fail in comparison. We really need a part 2. With Zombat 3, communist of Mars 2, new music, and more. PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE make another Arcade Paradise. I have nothing else to play, I am begging you, only thing I would change is making more daily task to earn euros. Everything else was simply perfect. 
Thank you for giving us such a great game full of nostalgia 💙
This is now my go to and favorite VR game to date, it’s relaxing and very satisfying gameplay! It’s especially cool u can play all the games plus I have not experienced any bugs!  Great game!

I grew up with Arcades, and this game definitely brings me back. The story is touching, but the games, minigames, tasks, all keep me coming back for more. If part2 is ever released, with 90s games, I'd buy it in a heartbeat. Bravo devs.

Game is great fun, but feels very lonely without the flatscreen-version’s customer models. It feels like you’re a homeless person doing your own laundry and playing arcade games while living in an abandoned laundromat than running a business, lol.

Occasionally there's issues with the hand tracking. I find your hands get caught on the washing machines and sometimes targeting specific things like picking up trash or emptying hoppers can be a bit finicky. 
But I still highly recommend the game overall. 
If you've never played Arcade Paradise before, you are Ashley and your father has left you in charge of his old laundromat, you soon start to turn the back room into an arcade with more machines and eventually it expands. 
So you do eventually get your own arcade paradise full of machines, you just have the actual game to play to get there. I like that concept. Really cool mixed reality mode too, you unlock it early on and can place arcade machines you've unlocked in game into your room and then walk around and play them. That is a cool idea and works very well.

One of my favorite games! I literally play it everyday 😁. I think it's funny that everything gets upgraded in the end except inside the restroom with that jacked up toilet 😂. 4th time completing the game. I love doing the laundry part. I literally don't upgrade to the point the washers are removed. 
So I've had this game for awhile now and I've noticed that the task of having 5 dryers going at the same time, never gives me the credits. I always have ALL the washers and dryers going at once so I don't understand why it doesn't work. Also, more recently, the task for doing 15 hacks in Blockchain doesn't show me doing any hacks either. Devs, do I need to contact u directly or is this something u can fix now? Thanks a bunch!

Do not buy this game.  You spend hours to get stuck after delivery.  As other reviews have mentioned the map is not interactive and you can't progress in the game.  This problem has been issue for awhile and developer still have not fixed  this issue.  
Again do not waste your money, the game will leave you upset.

Completely unique game. Awesome story, awesome concept. Started playing this game on my steamdeck but stopped and waited once I found out it was being ported to vr. Definitely enhanced the experience. 100% recommend.

reviews.review_title: Can’t play any of the arcade games/ nvm
reviews.review_description:
Game seems awsome but I can’t play any of the arcade games it won’t let grip the joy sticks on the arcade machines easily a 5 star if this would work for me devs please help

Update nvm I figured it out didn’t realize u have to use the joysticks on the controllers 

Only one other thing the to do list is kinda glitchy some objectives don’t check off other than that great game changed to 5 star

I heard good things about the original (player one podcast top five of the year!) but this VR experience is better than I imagined. The mix of arcade gaming and business sim is very addictive. Amazing game I keep coming back to.

I played the heck out of the 2D version of this and loved it. 

The VR version adds several new games and makes the laundry/trash section VR controls. 

It runs well and is everything I wanted in a VR version. My only complaint is that the VR hands get stuck in the laundry baskets more often than I'd want. It's not a big problem just slightly annoying. 

Overall, if you like arcades this is a solid game. Whether it's on VR or 2D.
Great game but hand interactions need some serious work. They constantly get caught on laundry machines.
This vr game is so hood you do washing and you earn money to buy arcade machines to play more best vr arcade game in my opinion
Auto pauses while playing and get stuck

developer_response.body: Hello, we're sorry to hear you're having problems, can you please tell us what headset you're playing on, and where the problem happens? This is the first time we've had a report like this.

reviews.review_description:
I was having fun with this game until I ordered the Jukebox.  The delivery animation played and then I found that the map where you place machines was non-interactive.  I couldn't back out, couldn't move toward the building; everything was frozen.  I exited and restarted the game and it played the animation again with the same result.

I immediately checked online to learn that this glitch existed at least two years ago with the Steam version.  Nobody was finding a solution then although I did see one reply from the developer.

Frankly I'm pretty ticked off that this version was recently released on Quest without having addressed this game-breaking bug.  I don't intend to restart hours' worth of gameplay from the start, especially knowing it could just happen again.

I gave 3 stars here because up till then this game was a lot of fun and showed promise, but I was sorely tempted to give 1 star.  If the bug gets fixed then I'll reconsider my rating, but until it is I can't recommend Arcade Paradise VR to anyone.  Given that this problem existed back in 2022 on the Steam version, I wouldn't hold my breath.

developer_response.body:
Hi AtlantisAuthor,

Sorry to hear you've been having issues. Are you able to email us at support@wiredproductions.com and we can investigate this bug issue you've been having? We may be able to fix the save file for you so that you are no longer blocked. Or at least we can work out the issue and release a patch which would help all users :-) 

Thank you,

reviews.review_description:
Was this game actually tested??

Running on Quest 3 and ive never seen a game stutter so much when walking and turning, even running it on thr wordt graphic option.

Dont try and grab 2 baskets at the same time as for some reason they want to teleport into a different position from where you are grabbing them, MOST the time into each other where you then have to fight yourself to free them! 

Hands getting stuck in the washing machine doors.

Washing going in, you shut the door and then it for some reason doesnt recognise the door as shut so you have to open the door and close it again.

All this happened within 20 minutes of so of playing.

Madness.

I was really looking forward to this (mainly for getting the arcades into Mixed Reality and using them) but that will never happen.

If i had the option to refund this i would.

developer_response.body:
HI there,

Sorry to hear you've been having issues with game stutter and control issues with the hands.

If you're able to, please could you send us some video of the issues that are occurring? (email support@wiredproductions.com) and we will  investigate these issues. 

Thanks

reviews.review_description: Well at first I really enjoyed the game, the tycoon aspect mixed with the arcade is really great. BUT at one point after I did the extension in the back when I order the juke box, I get stuck at the bus stop with the map in my hand but impossible to place the jukebox. I reset the game multiple times but same thing always happen, it's really disappointing. Dev please fix this bug

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Aleckarma1,

Sorry to hear you've been having an issue. Are you able to contact us at support@wiredproductions.com so we can investigate this bug for you? 

Thanks,

reviews.review_description: Love the game but need to swap locomotion and direction hands, can’t find the option in settings. Any ideas?

Please fix this black screen bug. I keep playing making it so far and then I get to a certain point and the game won’t load it just goes to a completely black screen but with sound. I uninstalled reinstalled several times. Finally got it working with a new save since the the previous one I guess got corrupted. So this is now happening again. Just loads to a black screen with sound. Please please fix this, i dig your game and it’s ashame I can’t experience it I’m sure the way you intended. Please work on this issue.

developer_response.body:
Edit 24/05/24 - We've just launched an update that should fix this! :) See our news post on the games page, update and let us know how you get on. If fixed we'd love you to update your view :) - Hi there, thank you for taking the time to write your review and for providing feedback on your experience. It sounds like you may have have a corrupt save, whilst this is a rare occurrence we have seen reports of this happening and we are actively working on a fix. For now, our recommended solution would be to take the following steps - although, please not this will mean that you will lose any save data so far. Go to Settings > Storage > find the app on the list > choose the memory stack options. This will delete your save data whilst keeping the app installed. If, after trying this recommendation, your issue is not resolved - please reach out to our support team via support@wiredproductions.com who will try to assist you further. Thank you.

UPDATE 23/05/24: Hi there, as of today we have just released a patch that fixes issues related to the black screen you describe. Hope this helps! :-)

reviews.review_description: Should have read the description better. Cleaning toilets? Really? Lost me, maybe rest of game is great, I will never know.
Not able to get to games stuck in some stupid laundromat

developer_response.body: Hi there, can you explain the problem? You should be able to get through the laundromat tutorial in around 10 minutes and then be able to play the games.

reviews.review_title: One of my top favs now
reviews.review_description: Previously my favorites would've probably been the workout genre of games: les mills, totf, etc. This has changed my mind. I can see some of the flat2vr bits like when cabinets are delivered or you go take the bus to and from the Laundromat. However the parts that were clearly remade for vr shine even brighter for the contrast.  The controls feel good and the core gameplay of doing chores and laundry feel rewarding. I've just gotten to the point where your sister is offering rewards for playing games 🤣 so now there also the tradeoffs of making money doing laundry versus doing her tasks. First time I've played a VR game so long I ran out of battery. And also making a relatively compelling story is a wonderful cherry on top. The slang (particularly when throwing the trash away) probably give people a little older than me nostalgic flashbacks. In conclusion a totally tubular game!

The game is great, if you're on the fence then get it! You can do as much laundry or as little as you like 🤣 the music is great and expanding your arcade empire is so addicting. I only wish there were NPCs walking around.
Wish there was a way to bypass the story mode and just play mixed reality. Now I'm running a laundromat so my kids can play arcades, lol.

reviews.review_title: How is this getting good reviews
reviews.review_description: Should be called laundry simulator VR. Refund!

Please can someone explain how i exit the game when i decide to play something else. I had to reset the vr yesterday.

Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for taking the time to review! To exit the games hold down the 'Y' button on your controller. We hope you continue to enjoy Arcade Paradise VR!

reviews.review_description:
Please whoever made this game read this because anytime I leave the game and rejoin I have to start a new game￼
￼

developer_response.body: Hi Joey, thank you for taking the time to leave a review. It would be great to get more information on the issue you are experiencing. If possible could you please reach out to our support team at support@wiredproductions.com who will try to assist you further. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Arcade paradise vr is fun than my hole life i did everything i need to do 19.99 and 20bucks

I received this product for free, but it is a very well put together and easy-on-the-eye ascetic. A couple of glitches here and there, but the developers will listen to the player base when they can, fixing issu s and bugs.

reviews.review_title: Game is great when it works
reviews.review_description:
Great game. Finished the original on steam deck but the VR version has some major issues.
1. The game doesn’t boot anymore. Gets stuck on the boot screen with the music.
2. When is was working the grab mechanic is very buggy, sometimes not recognizing the item right in front of you that you are pointing at.

developer_response.body:
Hi Neohunter,

Thanks for leaving the review, and sorry to hear you have the black screen bug. We have a working fix for it that's going through QA at the moment. Can't give an exact date for it but rest assured we're trying to get it out as soon as possible.

UPDATE 23/05/24:  Today we released a patch update that fixes a bunch of issues but also adds some QoL improvements. Hope this helps! :-)

reviews.review_description:
When I was a child my dream was owning my own arcade saloon. Now i can make it true in vr. Game mechanics are simple but very well implemented making it very addictive 
100% recommended!!

Honestly, I didn’t know what to think of the game at first. I was watching the intro, and was feeling sick that I had bought a laundromat simulator. However, I was happily surprised with how satisfying it feels to be running a business; rather than having a full arcade cabinet off rip. The laundry mini game feels good once you get into the groove, but the collision can be a little funky. I’m talking hands stuck in the basket, baskets stuck on baskets, but it doesn’t happen often enough to make the game unplayable. The arcade games themselves are awesome! Really recommend trying it out for yourself!

Nothing beats doing virtual laundry while ignoring your real life laundry in the other room!

The arcade games are a plus too! 😉

This game is like a love letter to those who grew up in the 80s and 90s. The graphics aren't quite as crisp as they are in the Steam version, but the immersion is so much higher because it's in VR! Even though it's labeled as Moderate comfort level, even those who suffer from VR sickness (like me) can play the game well. It's worth it!

reviews.review_title: 80's/90's... What a Time To Be Alive!
reviews.review_description: No pain/No gain! You must work your way to owning your dream arcade. Yes, it's repetitive but most jobs are, right? Anyway, I think you understand. With effort comes great reward and what is greater than owning your own, personal arcade? If there is something greater, why are you here then, lol. The arcade games are fun and the story getting you to Arcade Paradise is well done. I personally didn't want it to end. However, no more laundry = more game time. If this sounds like you, check this game out! You won't be sorry... Party on dude!

reviews.review_title: A paradise of arcade games and laundry
reviews.review_description: Honestly the aspect that surprised me most was just how well the story fit into the game. The whole vibe just felt right. From your sibling secretly helps you out to how you have a passion for arcade games and half a business degree but need to show your dad that you can make money. The laundry which you will do the most is pretty repetitive but simple, but you don't play this game for that. It's the wide variety of arcade games that you can jump into and other small minigames that are just part of your world. It thrives in the feeling of I have to work but I want to have fun. I'm from a later generation so i'm glad this game let's me experience arcade games in a way that is hard to find these days. Loved it.

reviews.review_title: An interesting port, to say the least
reviews.review_description:
First of all, I love the original game. I've sunk an hour or so into this VR port and these are my thoughts so far.

The few issues I've had are mostly the controller tracking, i.e. trying to pick up garbage, open machine doors etc. Also with hand rotation, like opening the safe and machine dials.

Graphically, it looks really good to my eye, with a nice amount of detail for me to feel immersed. The games look very sharp too, when you get to play them.

The little changes, like the WC cleaning/garbage toss mini games are also a very fun little touch.

Genuinely an enjoyable experience, minorly let down by some quirks with the controls which I can imagine will be patched out in the near future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to write your review, we super appreciate it and are so glad to hear you have had an enjoyable experience so far! We are currently looking into the issues you have experienced surrounding the control tracking and will get back to you as soon as possible on this.

reviews.review_description: Ever since Arcade Paradise VR's release, I've been playing it nonstop, at least an hour every day. I am SO obsessed with how great this game is. You guys should be proud of this game, including the original. Comparing the two, the VR translation was GREAT!

reviews.review_title: Contender for Quest 3 Game of the Year
reviews.review_description:
Hands down my favourite Quest 3 game of the year……so far! I had previously played the original release of Arcade Paradise on the PlayStation, so I was unsure what to expect in VR, but it’s an improvement on every level! Cleaning toilets, throwing out rubbish and cleaning laundry has never been so fun! Oh and the arcade games aren’t too bad either! Each game stands out in its own, especially the VR specific titles. The light gun games are my favourites so far, really feels like you’re in an arcade! 

So far only a couple of minor issues for me. The snap rotation is a little slow for me, I’m used to instant snap turns but even on the fastest setting it takes a noticeable amount of time to turn. The only other issue I’ve noticed so far is that the collision on the hands can be a bit buggy, hitting into things and grabbing things that you didn’t intend them to. The devs have been super responsive in the past though so I’m sure these things will be patched out sooner rather than later.

Congratulations to the devs, this is a fantastic game that you don’t want to miss out on!

reviews.review_title: Really fun game for the price
reviews.review_description: When you up the graphics in the settings on the quest 3 this game is quite visually impressive. Very smooth and great graphics. Fun gameplay.. keep comming back to it

i had a few issue with the game such as my hands getting stuck in baskets and then the baskets getting launched across the store and occasionally my hands would get stuck in the washing machine along with not being able to turn dials all the way some times but besides those issues its a pretty good game

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you so much for taking the time to review and for providing feedback. We are currently looking into the issue of hands getting stuck in various places around the King Wash and will provide more information on this once available. Aside from that, we are really glad to hear that you are enjoying your time in Arcade Paradise VR!

reviews.review_description: I've pretty much ditched all my other games for the time being just because I love this game that much. It really let's you feel like you're in an arcade, the story is actually really engaging to me, and the fact it's vr is just an added level of being thrown into the nostalgia. It may have a couple bugs, but they're really not game breaking at all except one bug where doors won't open sometimes on the tutorial day, but after that it's pretty smooth sailing.

Don’t really know what to say other than that it’s a neat, high quality game! Well, by high quality i don’t mean like AAA studio quality, of course you should expect a few bugs here and there. I clipped out of the map once and was told by the skybox that it’s not a bug, but instead a feature. Ignoring the occasional shkroo-ups, the game is actually really seamless, both gameplay and story wise. Definitely recommend!

reviews.review_title: Definitely one of my top favorite titles
reviews.review_description: This is an absolute gem of a game. I did not think I would enjoy it as much as I did but the developers have found a way to make even laundry or taking out the trash fun. Practically everything in the Arcade Paradise is a mini-game and that’s not even including the actual arcade machines themselves. Also pulling the chewing gum off of surfaces is super gross lol but so, so satisfying! There are the occasional issues with physics and/or collisions but those never really detract from the fun are easily outshined by everything else about the game, graphics, audio, gameplay, etc.

A solid VR game that touches greatly on nostalgia, the experience is solid and has very few technical issues at launch. It is a great addition to any library as it is a large collection of mini games and vr experiences that will enrich anyone's catalogue. 
One consistent issue I have seen is the hands, at this moment, right after launch, the hands will regularly get caught up in some objects and freak out until you return the hands to the stuck position and you manually unstuck them, same with the baskets, it's not a deal breaker but be prepared if you buy the game, I hope this gets fixed so everyone can have a perfect experience

developer_response.body: We are so glad to hear that you have enjoyed our nostalgic retro-adventure so far and hope you continue on your journey of virtual rags to arcade riches! Thank you as well for letting us know about the hands sometimes getting caught on objects throughout the game - the team is currently looking into this and we will provide an update as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description:
I really liked the first part of Arcade paradise as it was very intriguing
From other people reviews it looked very interesting but unfortunately there was a bug that would not let go past the laundry part

I couldn’t start the cycle because the button wouldn’t start the cycle, hope this gets fixed!
Nonetheless I would love to play this again.

reviews.review_title: Great Game Design, but tracking bugs
reviews.review_description:
Great Game design, but as the other people already have mentioned: The controls with the hands often is a little bit buggy. Especially when you want to pick up the rubbish. Often the items are not recognised to catch them up. Second point: Please add an instant snap turn without fading out. 

5 Stars with a patch that adresses these issues.
